title: Nipponorchis
taxonomy: Nipponorchis is a genus of flowering plants in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It consists of about five species of terrestrial orchids that are native to East Asia and Japan. The plants are characterized by their sympodial growth habit and have a single leaf that is often keeled or winged at the base. Nipponorchis species are relatively small in size and produce small, white or yellowish flowers. These plants are primarily found in shaded, moist areas and are often associated with the roots of trees and shrubs.
